en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: akuisa musa ariatʉkʉrana rumahlaʉ , asapucuaku mahlava luvucu.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.
I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: akuisa umaiaiapʉ rumahlaʉ, pulʉsʉaku laʉlaʉvʉ kumakita suhlatʉ.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: akuisa kiatarari rumahlaʉ, pauhli a laʉlaʉvʉ ihlakua siasuhlatʉ hla siasamusu.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: kihlamuhlamua pakiaturua ihlakua, “pasakulaikiia umacʉka mungahlangahla, kucikiia pasaʉrʉkʉcʉ!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
